content:
I mayyy have overdone it at 0.2g today. Ava definitely noticed something was up. I was going back and forth through the shop talking non stop and getting real excitable about everything. Yams?! Wooo!! I love yams. She goes "damn the ADHD is hitting hard today" and then I started ranting about micro plastics. It was a good time. I really like being that kinda way. Free and feeling emotions without shame

Maybe 0.15g tomorrow? See if that's the right amount. But it doesn't last all day either so maybe timing is more important? Idk. Apparently the sporeless p sub variety I found is quite strong so I should take that into account. 

I saw an Opera video where some therapist was talking about having a second marriage with the same person (metaphorically). It makea sense for Kate and I. We are ~35 now and met at ~18. We are hardly the same people we once were. But also we are actively looking at how we can change and grow more, defining our new goals and desires. You can't do that and keep things the same. 
All our recent experiences are our own choices too. It's different to having kids and buying a house etc. Those changes were by necessity and always part of the script. Now we are rewriting the script for the future and that means starting again in a way. It's a good viewpoint to stabilize expectations.
